mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_info (name, node_ids, start_script, stop_script, restart_script, jvm_opts, env_vars, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{nodeIds}, #{startScript}, #{stopScript}, #{restartScript}, #{jvmOpts}, #{envVars}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT node_ids FROM project_info WHERE id = #{id}
